spec.title: Controlled playback session and capability contract

humanSummary.text: Final audit found the controlled playback validator repair correct after rebase. TS and Rust reject session/report status mismatches and requested-operation evidence contradictions, valid trace-only fixtures still pass, and UTSUSHI-012 remains scoped to capability/session contracts without implementing jump, snapshot, live screenshot, or recording behavior.

findings.title: Fixture smoke operation metadata coverage is schema-heavy
findings.description: The schema accepts the broad smoke_validation requested operation, but the fixture adapter delegates smoke_validate through capture and therefore mostly exercises smoke_validation via schema fixtures rather than runtime adapter output.

evidence.detail: smoke_validate delegates through capture and fixture tests expect requestedOperation: capture.
The valid schema fixture covers requestedOperation: smoke_validation.

findings.impact: Future changes could regress adapter-emitted smoke operation metadata while schema fixtures continue passing.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: The fixture runtime adapter emits a smoke_validation controlled playback session through an adapter-owned path.
A Rust fixture test proves smoke_validation metadata is produced by the runtime adapter, not only by static schema fixtures.
The added coverage does not require jump, snapshot, live screenshot, or recording behavior.

proposedDagNode.title: Fixture smoke-validation adapter metadata coverage
proposedDagNode.summary: Add adapter-emitted smoke_validation metadata coverage so controlled playback smoke sessions are not covered only by static bridge-schema fixtures.
deliverables: Bridge-schema compatibility fixture update if needed
acceptanceCriteria: The fixture runtime adapter emits a smoke_validation controlled playback session through an adapter-owned path
A Rust fixture test proves smoke_validation metadata is produced by the runtime adapter, not only by static schema fixtures
The added coverage does not require jump, snapshot, live screenshot, or recording behavior
auditFocus: Fixture adapter overclaiming unsupported runtime operations
Smoke validation path drifting from controlled playback contract
